title.en: Pikuach Nefesh: When Saving a Life Overrides Everything
title.zh: 生命至上原则（Pikuach Nefesh）：当拯救生命凌驾于一切之上
title.he: פיקוח נפש: כאשר הצלת חיים גוברת על הכל

author: Torah Light Writing Team

cultural_parallels.description: Parallels between pikuach nefesh and Confucian teaching that ritual (礼) must serve human welfare, not undermine it. Both traditions recognize that rigid adherence to rules can violate the spirit of those rules.

header_image_style: Chinese ink wash (水墨) / shan shui (山水) landscape
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers, no prior Jewish knowledge
educational_goals: Understand the foundational principle of pikuach nefesh in Jewish law
Learn which commandments are overridden to save a life
Know when and how to act in emergencies without hesitation
Recognize mental health crises as pikuach nefesh situations
Understand the philosophical basis for life taking precedence
See parallels with Confucian ethical flexibility
